## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` has no warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new logic
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior changed
